rationale: EV-001 shows reg.exe executed at High integrity level by host-01\user-01 from C:\Users\IT01-user-01\Downloads\ — an atypical working directory for administrative registry changes — with the explicit command to set HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\EventLog\Start to 4 (disabled), confirmed written by A0. Disabling the Windows Event Log service is a well-known defense-evasion technique used to suppress audit trails. The parent process is cmd.exe with no visible command-line arguments, providing no legitimate administrative context. However, no confirmed malware execution, lateral movement, or payload delivery is evidenced in this package, and the action could theoretically be a misconfigured administrative script; the absence of broader attack-chain evidence caps confidence below malicious.
